title: PPS 3 x ALUMINIUM FOIL PLATTER TRAY - 44cm x 29cm disposable foil catering serving dish
features: Pack of 3 Large Foil Platters – Each 44cm x 29cm tray is ideal for serving party food, catering, and buffets. Durable & Sturdy Aluminium – Designed to hold heavy portions without bending or leaking, ensuring reliable food service. Elegant Silver Foil Finish – Perfect for weddings, corporate events, birthdays, and special occasions. Ideal for Catering & Events – Great for BBQs, banquets, and professional catering services. Convenient & Disposable – No washing up required—simply serve and discard for an easy cleanup. Versatile Serving Trays – Suitable for appetizers, sandwiches, meats, desserts, and buffet spreads.
description: Product Description Pack of 3 foil platters. 44cm x 29cm approx. Great for parties, restaurants and all types of catering functions. Take a look at our store for a full PPS range of catering supplies. Box Contains 3
